hooks.command: if [ -f package.json ]; then npm run lint 2>&1 && npm run build 2>&1 && npm run test 2>&1; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'rm\s+-rf|git\s+push\s+(--force|-f)|git\s+reset\s+--hard|git\s+clean\s+-[a-z]*f|git\s+checkout\s+--|git\s+restore\s+\.|DROP\s+(TABLE|DATABASE)|TRUNCATE\s+TABLE'; then echo 'BLOCKED: 위험한 명령어가 감지되었습니다.' >&2; exit 1; fi
